title: Technology Consultant
summary: Embed with enterprise clients to lead AI and digital-transformation engagements — from strategy through delivery.
responsibilities: Run discovery sprints and AI-readiness assessments
Advise client leadership on technology strategy and roadmaps
Lead cross-functional delivery teams on engagements
Translate business goals into technical execution plans
Develop case studies and contribute to thought leadership
requirements: 6+ years in tech consulting, product strategy, or engineering leadership
Track record running successful enterprise software engagements
Strong written and presentation skills with executive audiences
Working understanding of AI / cloud / data architectures
